response.step_by_step_log: The video features a performance titled 'パピプペポ' (PaPiPuPePo) by several VTubers. I identified the primary song as 'PPPP PaPiPuPePo' by emamouse, as confirmed by search results. I will map this song to the entire video content.
response.global_summary: A high-energy song performance by a group of VTubers on a virtual stage.

scenes.description: A group of VTubers perform a choreographed dance to the song 'PPPP PaPiPuPePo'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ピーピー やらかした
今日も やらかした
そこにアイツが 待ち構えていた
そして 見つかった
角で 見つかった
あの眼鏡みたい 丸い輪っか
両手にガッチャリ アレされ
キラリキラ
涙と一緒に 夜空に輝く（Peepy！）
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Peepy screw up
Screw up again today
They were waiting at there
And found
Found at the corner
Round ring like that glasses
Got locked on both hands, did that
Glitter
Shining in the night sky with tears (Peepy!)
